history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell row02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead (row02 colC) is lava, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal at row04 colD, I need to go downward first. Turning right will orient me to face down, allowing me to move to the safe cell at row03 colB.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead (row03 colB) is a floor tile (`.`), so it is safe to move forward. Moving down will bring me closer to the goal at row04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row03 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead (row04 colB) is safe floor, but moving there would lead to a dead end because the next cell after that (row05 colB) is a wall and the path to the goal is blocked by lava at row04 colC. Instead, I should turn left to face east, then move east twice to reach row03 colD, and then turn right to face down and move to the goal at row04 colD.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row03 column B facing right. The path to the goal at row04 column D is clear: move forward to C3, then forward to D3, then turn right to face down, and move forward to the goal at D4. No lava in the way. So my next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row03 column C facing right. Moving forward will take me to cell row03 column D, which is a floor cell. From there I can turn right to face down and then move forward to the goal at row04 column D. No lava or walls in the way. So my next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row03 column D facing right. The goal is at row04 column D, directly below me. To move downward, I need to turn right (clockwise) from facing right to facing down. Then I can move forward onto the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row03 col D facing down. The cell directly in front of me is row04 col D, which is the goal (G). I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
